mapper.select: SELECT cust_num, auth_kind, filter_kind, email_kind, email_addr1, addr_flag, kisa_agree, addr_dt, cb_sms_flag, cb_sms_term, cb_sms_clc, dynm_flag, wifi_id, wifi_date, msg_dn_time, notice_dn_time, url_holdoff, push_flag, push_key, platform_version, fsec_agree, impersonate_agree, block_international, block_roaming FROM customer_profile WHERE cust_num = #{decodeUserID}
SELECT save_dt FROM app_configurations_history WHERE channel = 'PASS' AND cust_num = #{decodeUserID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_configurations_history ( channel, cust_num, push_flag, save_dt, last_sms_clc ) VALUES ( 'PASS', #{decodeUserID}, '0', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'), NULL ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE save_dt = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s')
mapper.update: UPDATE customer_profile SET email_kind = #{emailKind}, auth_kind = #{authKind}, addr_flag = #{addrFlag}, kisa_agree = #{kisaAgree}, url_holdoff = #{urlHoldoff}, push_flag = #{pushFlag}, fsec_agree = #{fsecAgree}, impersonate_agree = #{impersonateAgree}, block_international = #{blockInternational}, block_roaming = #{blockRoaming}, filter_kind = #{filterKind} WHERE cust_num = #{custNum}
